supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on third-party service providers for significant operational services including technology systems and downstream service providers
risks: Third parties may experience cybersecurity events, financial distress, operational difficulties, or disruptions. Service providers located overseas subject to regional risks. Disruption in services could increase costs and adversely affect ability to deliver products and services to clients.

regulatory_risks: Capital and liquidity requirements under Regulatory Capital Rules (Basel III)
Enhanced prudential standards for large financial companies
Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) requirements and new final rule effective January 1, 2026
FDIC special assessments to recover losses from bank failures
Extensive regulation of U.S. financial services industry
Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act privacy requirements
FDIC deposit insurance requirements
State banking regulations across 15-state footprint
Prompt corrective action capital categories
Compliance with securities laws and SEC regulations
Federal banking law limits on capital distributions without prior regulatory approval
Volcker Rule compliance for proprietary trading restrictions
Proposed debit card interchange fee cap reductions
Stress testing and capital planning requirements (CCAR)
Consumer protection regulations
Bank Secrecy Act (BSA) and Anti-Money Laundering (AML) compliance requirements
State-level consumer privacy laws (California Consumer Privacy Act, New York DFS Cybersecurity Regulations)
Resolution and recovery planning requirements
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) regulatory authority over consumer financial products
Anti-money laundering and sanctions compliance
Anti-ESG and anti-DEI sentiment and related state actions limiting business with certain financial institutions
Volcker Rule restrictions on proprietary trading and covered fund investments
Federal Reserve oversight and stress testing requirements
CFPB final rule on personal financial data rights (Section 1033 implementation)
Complex and evolving laws and regulations regarding privacy and cybersecurity
Climate-related financial risk management principles from federal banking agencies
Enhanced prudential standards under Dodd-Frank Act
Proposed long-term debt requirements for large BHCs and IDIs
Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) recovery planning guidelines
Federal Trade Commission regulations on unfair or deceptive practices
Regulatory capital requirements under Basel III and Dodd-Frank Act

sanction_risks: Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) compliance requirements
Geopolitical destabilization could adversely impact loan portfolios through correlated and contingent risks
Tariffs or other trade policies enacted by U.S. government could worsen economic conditions
Potential changes to U.S. immigration policies affecting labor supply
Impact of Israel-Hamas war on commodity prices and supply chains
Impact of Russia-Ukraine war on commodity prices and supply chains affecting domestic borrowers
